One additional point reinforcing my agreement is that many dental software programs globally utilize the FDI scheme because of its structured format which aligns well with digital data management requirements. Furthermore, since the FDI system is taught in dental schools worldwide, students familiarize themselves early on with this standardized approach, cementing its prevalence in academic texts and subsequent professional work. These factors contribute significantly to its dominance over other systems such as the Universal or Grid methods.
